blocks.text: Methodology  |  The model reduces FSRS records to auditable lane-level sourcing signals.SOURCEFSRS supplier-roleWINDOW≤FY12–FY26RECENTFY22–FY26AS OF2026-05-22Objects counted at each workbook grain; values are not additive.Supplier records18,747Vendor-lane rows2,897Program vendor rows1,770Unique vendor UEIs1,250Supplier lanes132PIID & work-type grain used for sourcing signals.In-scope PIIDs39The answer comes from lane-level rewrites, not program totals. The workbook starts with ~18.7K supplier records and rebuilds them into 132 supplier lanes and 2,897 vendor-lane rows. That grain separates broad vendor presence from real lane-level concentration, second-source entry, and re-buy timing.Three signal tests translate reported awards into sourcing reads. Concentration = top-1 recent supplier share. Source diversification = prior single-source lanes now multi-source with the incumbent still active. Re-buy timing = next sourcing window from observed supplier-award cadence.The main caveat is data completeness, not internal math. FSRS levels are floors and FY26 is partial, so the model reads best as a relative sourcing-signal screen. Hidden checks reconcile supplier $M and records across independent cuts before signals are read.Reported levels are floors; FY26 is partial.Workbook layerWhat it carriesSignal rolePrimary tabsSource scopeFSRS supplier-role records; in-scopeshipbuilder-directed PIIDsDefines corpus & data caveatsSources; InputsLeaf evidenceLane $ & records; vendor by lane;vendor by lane × FY; role detail; prime datesKeeps every derived view auditableDetail TablesMarket cutsProgram, work type, vessel/builder,PIID, and vendor viewsSizes the reported supplier corpusMarket ViewsLane modelOne row per program, PIID, andwork typeCounts vendors, repeat share,shared-vendor footprint, lane flagsSupplier LanesSourcing signalsRe-buy timing, concentration, andsource diversificationConverts lane evidence intoopportunity screensIndicatorsReconciliationSupplier $M & records tie acrossindependent cutsGuards against broken formulas /dropped rowsChecksSource: FSRS supplier-role subaward records; workbook tabs Overview, Inputs, Sources, Detail Tables, Market Views, Supplier Lanes, Indicators; as of 2026-05-22. Inputs sets thresholds & recent-window controls; Detail Tables and Indicators carry the leaf-to-signal architecture.
